# Code of Conduct

LightweightVK is a small open-source project. The rules are short.

## Expected behavior

- Be respectful. Assume good faith.
- Keep discussion focused on the code and the project.
- Accept constructive criticism and offer it the same way.

## Unacceptable behavior

- Personal attacks, harassment, or insults — public or private.
- Sexualized language or imagery, or unwelcome sexual attention.
- Publishing anyone's private information without their permission.
- Off-topic political or ideological arguments in issues, PRs, or the Discord.

## Scope

This applies to all project spaces: the GitHub repository (issues, pull requests, discussions, commit messages, code comments) and the [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/bEyHyKCrvq).

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, remove, or reject any contribution that violates these rules, and may ban repeat offenders from the repository or Discord.

To report a problem, contact a maintainer using the channels listed in the [main README](../README.md).
